title: Hypixel Chat Tabs
description: Chat Tabs for Hypixel, "inspired" by Skytils
body:
Chat Tabs Inspired by [Skytils](https://modrinth.com/mod/skytils), allowing to display either:
- All Messages
- only Party Messages
- only Guild Messages
- only Direct/Private Messages from friends
- only Co-op Messages

The Buttons use Vanilla Button Textures, so their look is affected by Resource Packs
